required_preferences.fact: No longer schedules biweekly caregiving check-ins with her brother — now manages all care coordination and decisions for her mother herself

supersedes.fact: Aims for biweekly check-ins with her brother about caregiving — never lets disagreements fester without a conversation

required_preferences.fact: Adheres to a strict CPAP routine nightly for sleep apnea — no longer uses a bedtime alarm, relies on device alerts instead

supersedes.fact: Sets a bedtime alarm every night to manage insomnia — avoids caffeine after 2pm

required_preferences.fact: Texts her partner throughout the evening shift to stay connected — never relies only on calls
Joins virtual yoga every Wednesday at 6pm without fail — never reschedules for other commitments
Creates detailed training slides and tutorial videos for new hires every month, prioritizing clarity and accessibility — avoids generic templates and reuses only company-branded assets

persona: A remote customer service representative for a subscription-based software startup
